subject: fix(audit): critical detectFrequency bug, dead code removal, code quality fixes
body:
Fix detectFrequency() called with string[] dates instead of number[] intervals,
causing all new imported recurring patterns to have frequency:null and produce
zero forecast projections. Also fix timer leak, strengthen import validation,
reuse isDuplicate utility, remove orphaned components and unused exports.

Tags: audit, bugfix, patterns, import, cleanup
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 4
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: actuals-first-pivot
Semver: patch

title: critical detectFrequency bug, dead code removal, code quality fixes
